requirement_topic.en: Lithium Cell & Battery Pack Safety — BS EN IEC 62133-2
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电芯及电池组安全——BS EN IEC 62133-2
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電芯及電池組安全——BS EN IEC 62133-2

summary.en: Portable rechargeable lithium-ion and lithium-polymer cells and battery packs placed on the UK (Great Britain) market must satisfy the mandatory legal safety duties in the General Product Safety Regulations 2005 (SI 2005/1803) and, where the product is in scope as electrical equipment, the Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101). BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 is a UK designated/approved standard for portable sealed lithium secondary cells and batteries. It is a voluntary technical route that may give a presumption of conformity with relevant legal safety requirements when correctly applied; it is not itself the mandatory legal obligation and alternative technical evidence may be used. The standard covers electrical, mechanical, and environmental abuse tests including overcharge, forced discharge, short circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, and vibration. Manufacturers should hold suitable test reports and technical documentation, from a UKAS-accredited or ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory where appropriate, before placing goods on the GB market.
summary.zh: 在英国（大不列颠）市场销售的便携式可充电锂离子及锂聚合物电芯和电池组，须满足2005年《通用产品安全法规》（SI 2005/1803）规定的强制性法律安全义务；若产品属于电气设备适用范围，还须满足2016年《电气设备（安全）法规》（SI 2016/1101）。BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021是英国针对便携式密封锂二次电芯及电池组的指定/认可标准。该标准是自愿采用的技术路径，正确适用时可对相关法律安全要求赋予合规推定；其本身并非强制性法律义务，制造商也可使用其他技术证据证明合规。该标准涵盖电气、机械及环境滥用测试，包括过充、强制放电、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用及振动测试。制造商应在投放英国大不列颠市场前，持有适当的测试报告和技术文件，必要时由UKAS认可或ILAC MRA认可实验室出具。
summary.zht: 在英國（大不列顛）市場銷售的便攜式可充電鋰離子及鋰聚合物電芯和電池組，須滿足2005年《通用產品安全法規》（SI 2005/1803）規定的強制性法律安全義務；若產品屬於電氣設備適用範圍，還須滿足2016年《電氣設備（安全）法規》（SI 2016/1101）。BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021是英國針對便攜式密封鋰二次電芯及電池組的指定/認可標準。該標準是自願採用的技術路徑，正確適用時可對相關法律安全要求賦予合規推定；其本身並非強制性法律義務，製造商也可使用其他技術證據證明合規。該標準涵蓋電氣、機械及環境濫用測試，包括過充、強制放電、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用及振動測試。製造商應在投放英國大不列顛市場前，持有適當的測試報告和技術文件，必要時由UKAS認可或ILAC MRA認可實驗室出具。

standards_or_laws: BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — voluntary UK designated/approved standard for portable sealed lithium secondary cells and batteries; may give presumption of conformity, alternatives allowed
General Product Safety Regulations 2005 (SI 2005/1803) — general safety duty
Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1101) — where product is in scope as electrical equipment

summary.en: China's domestic mandatory standard for portable lithium battery safety is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for lithium-ion cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment), enforced by SAMR under the compulsory certification (CCC) framework for applicable product categories. For mobile phone batteries specifically, GB 18287-2013 applies. Both standards are technically derived from IEC 62133 but incorporate national deviations. Chinese CNAS-accredited lab reports to GB 31241 or GB 18287 are not automatically accepted as proof that the product meets UK legal safety duties; if relied on, the UK technical file must explain how the evidence satisfies GPSR 2005 and, where applicable, EES Regs 2016 requirements or why additional BS EN IEC 62133-2 evidence is not needed.
summary.zh: 中国关于便携式锂电池安全的强制性国内标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子产品用锂离子电池和电池组安全要求），由市场监管总局依据强制性认证（CCC）框架对适用产品类别实施管理。针对手机电池，GB 18287-2013适用。两项标准均源自IEC 62133，但含有国家偏差。国内CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241或GB 18287出具的检测报告，不会自动被接受为产品满足英国法律安全义务的证明；若拟依赖该等证据，英国技术文件须说明其如何满足GPSR 2005以及适用时的2016年EES法规要求，或说明为何无需补充BS EN IEC 62133-2证据。
summary.zht: 中國關於便攜式鋰電池安全的強制性國內標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子產品用鋰離子電池和電池組安全要求），由市場監管總局依據強制性認證（CCC）框架對適用產品類別實施管理。針對手機電池，GB 18287-2013適用。兩項標準均源自IEC 62133，但含有國家偏差。國內CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241或GB 18287出具的檢測報告，不會自動被接受為產品滿足英國法律安全義務的證明；若擬依賴該等證據，英國技術文件須說明其如何滿足GPSR 2005以及適用時的2016年EES法規要求，或說明為何無需補充BS EN IEC 62133-2證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for lithium-ion cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment (SAMR, mandatory)
GB 18287-2013 — Secondary lithium batteries for mobile phones (SAC, mandatory for mobile phone batteries)

gap.en: Exporters holding only GB 31241 or GB 18287 test reports need a UK-facing conformity evidence package for GPSR 2005 and, where applicable, EES Regs 2016. BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 testing is a practical voluntary route to support presumption of conformity, but the legal duty is compliance with the UK regulations, not compulsory use of that named standard. Where an alternative technical solution is used, the technical file must justify how it meets the relevant safety requirements. Particular gaps include: (1) differences in test scope, pass/fail criteria, and documentation format between GB and BS EN/IEC evidence; (2) UK Declaration of Conformity or equivalent compliance documentation referencing applicable UK legislation and any standards used; (3) UKCA or CE marking where the product falls within a marking regime accepted for Great Britain; (4) English-language safety instructions and labelling. Battery-only products require suitable safety evidence; power banks may additionally fall under electrical equipment safety rules.
gap.zh: 仅持有GB 31241或GB 18287测试报告的出口商，需要建立面向英国的合规证据包，以证明符合GPSR 2005以及适用时的2016年EES法规。BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021测试是支持合规推定的实用自愿路径，但法律义务是符合英国法规，而不是强制使用该具名标准。若采用其他技术方案，技术文件须说明其如何满足相关安全要求。主要差距包括：（1）GB证据与BS EN/IEC证据在测试范围、合格/不合格判定标准及文件格式上的差异；（2）英国合规声明或等效合规文件须引用适用英国法规及所采用标准；（3）产品属于大不列颠认可标志制度范围时，须加贴UKCA或CE标志；（4）英文安全说明及标签。仅电池产品须具备适当安全证据；移动电源还可能额外适用电气设备安全规则。
gap.zht: 僅持有GB 31241或GB 18287測試報告的出口商，需要建立面向英國的合規證據包，以證明符合GPSR 2005以及適用時的2016年EES法規。BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021測試是支持合規推定的實用自願路徑，但法律義務是符合英國法規，而不是強制使用該具名標準。若採用其他技術方案，技術文件須說明其如何滿足相關安全要求。主要差距包括：（1）GB證據與BS EN/IEC證據在測試範圍、合格/不合格判定標準及文件格式上的差異；（2）英國合規聲明或等效合規文件須引用適用英國法規及所採用標準；（3）產品屬於大不列顛認可標誌制度範圍時，須加貼UKCA或CE標誌；（4）英文安全說明及標籤。僅電池產品須具備適當安全證據；行動電源還可能額外適用電氣設備安全規則。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — comply with GPSR 2005 and, where applicable, EES Regs 2016; BS EN IEC 62133-2 is a voluntary UK designated/approved standard that may give presumption of conformity, with alternatives allowed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 required under SAMR/CCC framework for applicable portable electronic product categories; GB 18287-2013 for mobile phone batteries

source.publisher: UK Government (Department for Business and Trade) — placing UKCA or CE marked products on the market in Great Britain

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The mandatory UK obligation is to place only safe, legally compliant lithium cells and battery packs on the Great Britain market under GPSR 2005 and, where applicable, EES Regs 2016. BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 is not mandatory law; it is a voluntary designated/approved standard that may support presumption of conformity. Chinese GB 31241 or GB 18287 reports alone will usually not be enough unless the technical file explains equivalence to UK legal requirements. UKCA or CE marking may be used where the applicable GB product-marking regime accepts it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】英国的强制性义务，是依据GPSR 2005以及适用时的2016年EES法规，仅将安全且符合法律要求的锂电芯和电池组投放英国大不列颠市场。BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021并非强制性法律；它是可支持合规推定的自愿指定/认可标准。仅凭中国GB 31241或GB 18287报告通常不足，除非技术文件能够说明其等同满足英国法律要求。在适用的大不列颠产品标志制度接受的情况下，可使用UKCA或CE标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】英國的強制性義務，是依據GPSR 2005以及適用時的2016年EES法規，僅將安全且符合法律要求的鋰電芯和電池組投放英國大不列顛市場。BS EN IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021並非強制性法律；它是可支持合規推定的自願指定/認可標準。僅憑中國GB 31241或GB 18287報告通常不足，除非技術文件能夠說明其等同滿足英國法律要求。在適用的大不列顛產品標誌制度接受的情況下，可使用UKCA或CE標誌。
